untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pattern detection (head-and-shoulders identification with shoulder prices A, B, D, E and trough/midpoint references X, Y) and geometric validation (vertical symmetry, neckline slope measurement in degrees). The allowed indicator set contains only price-based technical indicators and moving averages. Pattern recognition requiring multi-bar feature extraction, shoulder/trough identification, and angular slope calculation cannot be expressed with the available indicators. Additionally, the signal specifies percentage-based deviations from calculated midpoint reference levels (5% thresholds for E vs X, B vs X, A vs Y, D vs Y), which would require custom computed fields not in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Signal requires custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of available indicators. Would need: (1) algorithmic identification of pattern components (shoulders A, E and troughs B, D), (2) calculation of midpoint references X and Y, (3) percentage deviation calculations from these computed midpoints, (4) neckline slope computation in degrees. Consider implementing this as a dedicated pattern recognition module rather than a rules-based condition set.
